# CWE-841: Improper Enforcement of Behavioral Workflow (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-841-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

var accountMFAPassed = map[string]bool{}
var accountPasswords = map[string]string{}

// Safe: reset requires the MFA workflow step to be completed first.
func ResetAccount(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	email := r.FormValue("email")
	newPass := r.FormValue("new_password")
	if !accountMFAPassed[email] {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	accountPasswords[email] = newPass
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
